report.summary: Created OG images for 2 new learn guides (Symbiotic Protocol, Modular Blockchain Stack), added Related Guides sections, improved table readability with zebra striping, and updated OG metadata to use static SVGs

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added Related Guides section to Symbiotic Protocol page (4 related articles: Restaking AVS, Modular Blockchain, LRT Compared, Karak Network) — follows article reading flow pattern for keeping users on-site

Added Related Guides section to Modular Blockchain Stack page (4 related articles: DA Layer Guide, Symbiotic Protocol, Appchains Guide, Blockchain Trilemma) — cross-links the two new pages to each other
Added zebra striping (alternating row backgrounds) to comparison tables on both pages for improved scanability
Updated OG image metadata on both pages from dynamic API route to static SVG files for faster social preview loading and reliability

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: symbiotic-protocol-restaking-guide (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with network node diagram, restaking flow visualization (Collateral → Vault → Network), stats pills ($1.6B+ TVL, 70+ Networks, 1,200+ Operators), gradient title, degen0x branding

OG image: modular-blockchain-stack-guide-2026 (1200x630 SVG) — dark theme with 4-layer modular stack diagram (DA/Execution/Settlement/Consensus), color-coded layers (cyan/indigo/amber/green), key stats (100 MB/s EigenDA, 70% Adoption, 55x Cost Savings), degen0x branding

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/symbiotic-protocol-restaking-guide — well-structured with TOC, info boxes, comparison table, FAQ, risk disclaimer, and BackToTop; added related articles and table polish
/learn/modular-blockchain-stack-guide-2026 — well-structured with TOC, two comparison tables, 3 protocol deep-dives, FAQ section; added related articles and table polish

sections.title: UX Audit Notes (No Issues Found)
items: Both pages have proper mobile support via overflowX:auto on tables and maxWidth:820 article container
Touch targets on TOC links are adequate (line-height: 2 gives ~28px per link)
Category badges and reading time metadata are visible and well-positioned
Internal links use consistent #58a6ff color and are properly distributed throughout content
BackToTop component present on both pages
Breadcrumb navigation correctly shows Home > Learn > Guide Name hierarchy
